title: Japan's economy grows at annualized 2.1% rate in first quarter, beating expectations
summary_full: The growth was sharply higher compared with Reuters-polled analysts' average estimate of 1.7%, and against the 1.3% in the previous quarter.
summary_public: The growth was sharply higher compared with Reuters-polled analysts' average estimate of 1.7%, and against the 1.3% in the previous quarter.
